sections.title: Geographic Location and Area
paragraphs: Jeddah is located on the Red Sea coast in western Saudi Arabia and is the main gateway for pilgrims and Umrah visitors.
The city extends over more than 1,600 square kilometers and includes a vital seaport and a growing economic zone.
Jeddah is known for its long coastal corniche and diverse tourism facilities, making it one of the region's leading coastal cities.

cta.title: Help Build Better Arab Cities
cta.description: Join a network of municipalities, researchers, and practitioners in a pioneering experience
